analysis.reasoning: Core message: China and Tanzania held an online conference where experts/doctors shared experiences using traditional medicine against COVID-19 and pledged to strengthen cooperation in applying traditional medicine to treat diseases. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) — Not present; no mention of the West or criticism. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Yes; the tweet highlights international cooperation, knowledge sharing, and commitment to joint health efforts, portraying China as cooperative and supportive. CH3 (epic history) — Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic) — Not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic governance or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) — Not directly; no claims about domestic achievements or leadership superiority, just cooperation. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) — Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
